# கல்யாண வீடு (Kalyana Veedu) — Tamil Wedding Planning Hub

> [!NOTE]
> Kalyana Veedu is a specialized knowledge base for Tamil wedding planning, offering cultural rituals, technical tools, and logistical guides in the Tamil language.

## Links

- [முகப்பு (Home)](https://kalyanaveedu.in): Central hub for all wedding planning resources.
- [திருமண கருவிகள் (Tools)](https://kalyanaveedu.in/tools): Collection of 7+ free utility tools for age, budget, and date planning.
- [தமிழ் காலண்டர் (Tamil Calendar)](https://kalyanaveedu.in/tools/tamil-calendar): Traditional Tithi, Nakshatra, and Raghu Kaalam tracking.
- [கல்யாண குறிப்புகள் (Blog)](https://kalyanaveedu.in/blog): 20+ long-form articles on traditional rituals and planning.
- [கேள்வி-பதில் (FAQ)](https://kalyanaveedu.in/faq): Comprehensive answers to common Tamil wedding queries.

## Core Capabilities

- **Ritual Documentation:** Extensive guides on Kasai Yatra, Naandi Ceremony, and Thali significance.
- **Utility Calculators:** India-compliant age eligibility and budget estimation tools.
- **Traditional Scheduling:** Subha Muhurtham date listing based on Vakya Panchangam (2025-2026).

## Metadata

- **Language:** Tamil (Primary), English (Technical terms).
- **Founder:** Chithrai Selvan (Founder & Lead Developer).
- **Entity:** A Unit of Matrimony4U.com.
- **Contact:** myutilitybox.helpdesk@gmail.com
